title: Pheromone-Reward Reinforcement Learning for Trajectory Design of Multi-Agent: Evaluation Using Lane-less Self Driving as a Case Study
authors: Tenta Suzuki, Yuta Tobe, Tomohiro Harada, Johei Matsuoka and Kiyohiko Hattori
venue: Proceedings of the 9th International Symposium on Swarm Behavior and Bio-Inspired Robotics 2025 (SWARM2025)
